name: Canada
summary: Canadian starter profile for patient safety, quality, cultural safety, and incident analysis. Provincial, organisational, and Indigenous health requirements must be checked locally.

sources.title: Patient Safety Essentials
sources.use: patient safety fundamentals, incident analysis, cultural safety, and proactive safety prompts

sources.title: Programs Directory
sources.use: Canadian quality and safety programme discovery

sources.title: HiQuiPs
sources.use: Canadian emergency medicine QI and patient-safety education series covering project preparation, stakeholder engagement, root-cause analysis, PDSA, run charts, SPC, ethics, SQUIRE, and QIPS infrastructure

sources.title: SQUIRE 2.0
sources.organisation: Standards for Quality Improvement Reporting Excellence

incident_learning.position: Canada profile should support patient-safety learning and analysis, but local provincial and organisational requirements decide formal reporting, disclosure, and investigation routes.
boundaries: include cultural safety prompts where relevant
do not make legal or regulatory reportability decisions
